content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based selloff led by IT (-5.20%) dragging Nifty down -1.04%, with VIX spiking +4.90% to 19.50 signaling rising fear. Defensives (FMCG, select Pharma, Metals) showing relative strength but this is clearly a risk-off session. Book is 68% deployed with modest net-positive P&L; priority is managing existing positions and trailing stops, not adding new exposure late in the day.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -5.6% from entry but thesis intact: Q4 PAT +34.9%, NIM 3.95% best-in-class, NNPA 0.13%. Current price Rs 76.87 still above SL 74.50. Recent sharp rally from Rs 64 to Rs 82 then pullback - consolidation normal. Hold with existing SL; if 74.50 breaks, thesis broken."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1013.22,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +4.7% with strong momentum (GNPA <1%, AAA upgrade, MOFSL PT 1143). Current SL already at 1013.22 = breakeven+ (above entry 984). SL is already tight/above entry so no change needed — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold appropriate given VIX spike and geopolitical backdrop. P&L -0.8% immaterial. SL 119 is ~4% below CMP - adequate. Thesis (INR weakness, central bank buying, tariff overhang) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1410.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "At fresh 52-week high Rs 1425 with +0.9% P&L. SL already at 1410 which is nearly breakeven (entry 1412.94). Values match current — no change. Emitting HOLD via position_actions; retracting MODIFY would be no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.8%, near 52-week high. Q4 results Apr 27 (3 days out) - binary event. Current SL 1049 is already at entry (breakeven). Tightening minimally to 1049.05 covers entry + small buffer. Event risk is key - if result beats, continue; if miss, breakeven exit protects capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.1%, near 52-week high. Q4 results Apr 29 - binary event. SL 672 is ~2% below CMP, reasonable. At top of consensus target band with FDA overhang - not raising SL further to avoid premature stop-out from volatility before earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.2% from entry; CMP 2312 testing. SL 2260 gives ~2.3% additional room. Q4 results Apr 30 - binary. Position still within risk budget. Let SL 2260 do its job; thesis (pricing power, rural recovery) still plausible."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Down -0.8%, small loss. SL 393 ~2% below CMP. Thesis intact (MSCI ESG upgrade, summer peak demand, Q4 May 15). Holding through consolidation; SL will trigger if 393 breaks."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post-strong Q4; SL 74.50 provides adequate room below VWAP 76.61."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1013.22 (breakeven+), up +4.7%. Target 1100 still has room. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position; minor P&L drag acceptable given macro backdrop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (1410 vs entry 1412.94). At 52W high; let momentum run toward 1480 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results binary event in 3 days. Tightening SL to exact entry (1049.05) ensures breakeven+ exit if result disappoints. Currently at 1049."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near 52W high pre-Q4 earnings Apr 29. Existing SL 672 (~2%) appropriate - don't over-tighten before event volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Negative P&L but within risk budget. Q4 Apr 30 is catalyst. SL 2260 is the line - let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, SL 393 ~2% below. Thesis (summer demand, ESG upgrade) intact."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND - strong post-earnings momentum plays already owned; no need to add. AUBANK Q4 Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, BRITANNIA Apr 28, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, KAJARIACER Apr 30 - multiple earnings clustered next week; event risk dense. INDUSINDBK - avoid (SFIO investigation, 91% PAT collapse, promoter pledge). NMDC, SCHAEFFLER, ADANIENSOL - interesting but all near 52-week highs on a -1% Nifty day with VIX spiking; not the session to chase breakouts. COLPAL/BRITANNIA - defensive FMCG adds deferred given portfolio already has NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR (FMCG cluster at ~4.6% + 4.7% = already meaningful).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed, at the hysteresis threshold. With VIX +4.9%, IT collapsing, and three earnings events in portfolio holdings next week (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30), the correct posture is defensive position management - not new entries. Tightened AUBANK SL to breakeven ahead of Q4 event. Other positions sized appropriately with SLs in place. Cash buffer Rs 324K provides flexibility for post-earnings setups next week. Cumulative P&L +0.28% - steady, preserving capital through a volatile session."
}
